title: Final judgment
doc_html:
Art. 1912. Final judgment

            A final judgment may be signed in any place where the judge is physically located and shall be sent to the clerk of the court in which the case is pending.

            Amended by Acts 1974, No. 242, §1; Acts 2023, No. 5, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 1912.  Final judgment
A final judgment may be signed in any place where the judge is physically located
and shall be sent to the clerk of the court in which the case is pending.
Amended by Acts 1974, No. 242, §1; Acts 2023, No. 5, §1.
